data.title: TAT Technologies Secures $17 Million MRO Deal With Major Cargo Carrier: Details
data.description: TAT Technologies has secured a $17 million MRO deal with a major North American cargo carrier to service APUs on Boeing 757 and 767 aircraft, strengthening its market position.

data.title: 'Walking Piggy Banks To Be Shaken Down' – Airline Execs Face Backlash From Lawmakers For Soaring Fees And Miserable Passenger Experiences
Jeff Bezos Had More Money Than All Bitcoins Put Together Just 4 Years Ago, This Was The Moment When It Changed
data.description: Jeff Bezos, founder of tech giant Amazon, has amassed enormous wealth over the last few decades, with figures relating to his personal fortune astounding people from time to time.

data.title: Donald Trump Reportedly Tapping Brian Quintenz As Head Of Commodity Futures Trading Commission
data.description: Brian Quintenz, a former Republican commissioner of the CFTC and current head of a16z Crypto, is a top contender to lead the agency under Trump, signaling a potential shift in regulatory approach to digital assets.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Experts Share Their Top Crypto Predictions For 2025
data.description: As 2024 closes out a milestone year for cryptocurrency and blockchain technology, industry leaders project 2025 will mark an era of transformative growth.
